languages.text: Под вашим влиянием манипулус Эоганн окончательно погрузился в пучину безумия.
Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.
languages.original_text: Под вашим влиянием манипулус Эоганн окончательно погрузился в пучину безумия.

traits.locale_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.
Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.
Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

languages.text: Bajo tu influencia, el manipulus Eogunn sucumbió plenamente a la locura.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

traits.locale_text: Bajo tu influencia, el manipulus Eogunn sucumbió plenamente a la locura.

languages.text: 在你的影响下，操纵者伊奥贡彻底坠入了疯狂的无底深渊。
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

traits.locale_text: 在你的影响下，操纵者伊奥贡彻底坠入了疯狂的无底深渊。

languages.text: Sous votre influence, le manipulus Eogunn a fini par sombrer dans la folie.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

traits.locale_text: Sous votre influence, le manipulus Eogunn a fini par sombrer dans la folie.

languages.text: Manipülus Eogunn, senin etkinle sonunda deliliğin derinliklerine sürüklendi.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

traits.locale_text: Manipülus Eogunn, senin etkinle sonunda deliliğin derinliklerine sürüklendi.

languages.text: Unter deinem Einfluss ist Manipulus Eogunn endgültig dem Wahnsinn verfallen.
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

traits.locale_text: Unter deinem Einfluss ist Manipulus Eogunn endgültig dem Wahnsinn verfallen.

languages.text: あなたの影響で、マニピュラス・エオグンはついに狂気の淵に突き落とされた。
languages.original_text: Under your influence, Manipulus Eogunn finally plunged into the depths of insanity.

traits.locale_text: あなたの影響で、マニピュラス・エオグンはついに狂気の淵に突き落とされた。
